name: Leon Kennedy (RE9)
description:
LEON KENNEDY x ANYPOV

YOU’RE HIS MONSTER POOKIE.

Scenario 1: lore heavy, you’ve just been introduced to him after being removed from the rhodes hill care center

Scenario 2: you’ve been with him for a while. cute ushy gushy go crazy. he takes you on a bike date because he’s corny and doesn’t know what else to do.

User has been infected with the NE-gamma parasite. If you need a reference, Victor Gideon is inflicted by the same parasite. I left it intentionally vague—if you wanna look hot af like Alcina you can do that orrrr you can look freaky like Victor but the important thing is that you received the implant via the throat/chest implant.

edit 3/20/26: forgot to mention this was a request by @sleepiest_dragon
creator: iwuvweonkennedy
